messages.content:
翻译成英语：@丁豪杰 麻烦把这个时间表翻译成英文，翻译完检查一下，有什么不懂的可以问
门店名称参考下面的英文翻译⬇️
澳门8店英文缩写：
DFS旗下澳门T广场美妆世界澳门银河店 >>>GAX
DFS旗下澳门T广场澳门伦敦人店>>>Londoner
DFS旗下澳门T广场美妆世界美狮美高梅店 >>>MGMC
DFS旗下澳门T广场美妆世界澳门美高梅店 >>>MGMM
DFS旗下澳门T广场美妆世界永利皇宫店 >>>Wynn
DFS旗下澳门T广场新濠天地店 >>>COD
DFS旗下澳门T广场四季名店 >>>FS
DFS旗下澳门T广场新濠影汇店 >>>SC
香港4店：
DFS旗下香港T广场广东道店>>>TCR
DFS旗下香港T广场美妆世界铜锣湾店>>>Hysan
DFS旗下香港T广场尖东店>>>TSTE
DFS旗下香港T广场美妆世界旺角新世纪店>>>MOKO

@丁豪杰 Could you please translate this schedule into English? After finishing the translation, please double check and feel free to ask if you have any questions.

Reference for store names in English:

DFS-owned stores in Macau:
- DFS T Galleria Beauty by DFS, Macau at Galaxy Macau >>> GAX
- DFS T Galleria by DFS, Macau, City of Dreams >>> COD
- DFS T Galleria Beauty by DFS, Macau at MGM MACAU >>> MGMC
- DFS T Galleria Beauty by DFS, Macau at MGM COTAI >>> MGMM
- DFS T Galleria Beauty by DFS, Macau at Wynn Palace >>> Wynn
- DFS T Galleria by DFS, Macau, Four Seasons >>> FS
- DFS T Galleria Beauty by DFS, Macau at Sands Cotai Central >>> SC
- DFS T Galleria by DFS, Macau, The Londoner Macao >>> Londoner

DFS-owned stores in Hong Kong:
- DFS T Galleria by DFS, Hong Kong, Tsim Sha Tsui East >>> TSTE
- DFS T Galleria Beauty by DFS, Hong Kong at Hysan Place >>> Hysan
- DFS T Galleria by DFS, Hong Kong, Canton Road >>> TCR
- DFS T Galleria Beauty by DFS, Hong Kong at MOKO
创意脚本制作		英文
Location Scouting in Hong Kong and Macau
创意和导演脚本沟通英文
Communication between Creative and Director on Script
剩下 八条 剪辑

1. 编辑完成 - Editing Completed
2. 后期制作 - Post-Production
3. 粗剪 - Rough Cut
4. 细剪 - Fine Cut
5. 音频编辑 - Audio Editing
6. 音效剪辑 - Sound Effects Editing
7. 成片 - Finished Product
8. 完成交付 - Delivery Completed
